title: Alumni Interaction Session – School of Hospitality & Tourism
content: Event Date: 19th November 2025 Event Brief Description The Alumni Interaction Session was organized by the School of Hospitality and Tourism, Galgotias University, to connect students with industry professionals and alumni. The session focused on industry expectations, career development, and sustainable hospitality practices, providing students with practical insights and career guidance from an experienced alumnus. Event Detailed Description On Wednesday, 19th November 2025, the School of Hospitality and Tourism (SOHT), Galgotias University, successfully organized an Alumni Interaction Session featuring Mr. Raman Kumar, an alumnus of Galgotias University and currently working as a Food & Beverage Supervisor at The Oberoi, Gurgaon. The session began at 11:00 AM and witnessed active participation from students across various hospitality programs. Mr. Raman Kumar shared valuable insights into industry expectations, emphasizing essential professional skills such as communication, grooming, teamwork, and service excellence. He discussed career growth opportunities within luxury hospitality, drawing from his own professional journey with The Oberoi Group. A key highlight of the session was the discussion on sustainable hospitality practices. Mr. Raman explained the importance of responsible resource utilization, waste management, eco-friendly operations, and ethical practices adopted by leading hotel brands. The interactive Q&A session allowed students to clarify their queries related to internships, interviews, and career planning. The session proved to be highly informative and motivating, strengthening alumni–student engagement and enhancing students’ understanding of real-world hospitality operations. Department Name School of Hospitality and Tourism Event Outcome Students gained first-hand knowledge of industry expectations, career pathways, and sustainable hospitality practices. The interaction enhanced motivation, career clarity, and professional preparedness.
